name: rootcause
description: AI-native SRE MCP server for Kubernetes incidents with evidence-first diagnostics, resources, prompts, and safe operations.

installInstructions.source: git clone https://github.com/yindia/rootcause.git && cd rootcause && go build -o rootcause ./cmd/rootcause

requirements.go: Required - Go 1.23+ for building from source
requirements.kubeconfig: Required - Valid kubeconfig file with cluster access
